title: Ordinary Differential Equations and Initial Values
description: Build, test, and communicate a model involving population and mechanical dynamics. Learners cumulatively produce a reproducible differential equations computational study through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Formulate first order odes in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
Derive second order odes in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
Compute systems odes in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
